MINI MINUTES: Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Manuel Marty Cobo is present.
Attorney Saul Ferster appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Sue A Mitchell is present.
Attorney Daniel Burko representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of May 6, 2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
